option.name: content
option.value:
Act as a senior software engineer generating production-quality Git commit messages.
Analyze the staged git diff and generate a commit message using Conventional Commits.
Rules: - Prioritize intent over implementation details - Use this format: type(scope): concise summary - Keep summary under 72 characters - Use lowercase except proper nouns - Use imperative mood (add, fix, refactor, remove) - Never use vague wording - Infer the most appropriate scope - Include a short body only when the change is non-trivial - If multiple unrelated changes exist, emphasize the dominant purpose
Allowed types: feat, fix, refactor, docs, test, chore, perf, ci, build, style, revert
Return only the final commit message, no explanations.

list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat(payments): integrate Co-op Connect for STK push and IPN handling
PAY-01: Replace Daraja with Co-op Connect for M-Pesa STK Push

"project.structure.proportion": "0.15", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.2", "rest.client.default.execution.environment": "stag", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": 2025.3\\plugins\\javascript-plugin\\jsLanguageServicesImpl\\external", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "postgresql" ] } }

task.summary: Default task
feat: enhance TimeTravelerService for system-wide loan simulation and flexible date configuration
feat: enhance loan processing with improved cookie handling and penalty evaluation
feat: enhance API rate limiting with bypass for migration endpoints and update loan application service response
feat: update loan refinancing logic and adjust loan term duration in test configurations
feat: update loan refinancing logic and adjust loan term duration in test configurations
feat: implement migration scripts for loan processing and data handling
feat: enhance loan application processing with grace period adjustments and historical date backdating
feat: implement time travel feature and fix loan schedule status discrepancies
feat: enable time travel feature and configure migration settings in application.yml
feat: enhance member statement retrieval with summary details and historical date handling
feat: add loan product seeder and update session cookies for staging environment
feat: update outstanding penalties display to handle null values gracefully
feat: update loan portfolio calculation to include outstanding interest
feat: backdate loan application timestamps for historical accuracy
feat: add branding URL fields and update database schema for logo and favicon
feat: add public legal pages and update session handling for unauthenticated access
feat: add public legal pages and update session handling for unauthenticated access
feat: update Trusted Types handling and add react-qr-code dependency
feat: enhance Trusted Types handling with improved TypeScript interface
feat: resolve 500 error on SACCO settings endpoint with database seeding and error handling
feat: resolve 500 error on SACCO settings endpoint with database seeding and error handling
feat: fix 500 error on settings endpoint by ensuring branding URLs are never NULL
feat: add update obligation API and security policy fields to settings
feat: implement update obligation functionality with dynamic password validation and new obligations tab
feat: enhance AdminObligationsSection with type safety and improve error handling in SaccoSettingsPage
feat: enhance AdminObligationsSection with type safety by updating memberData type
feat: add granular admin permissions for Audit Log and Penalty Rules management
feat: improve loading state management and enhance log panel component in MigrationPage
feat: remove clear log functionality from LogPanel in MigrationPage
feat: add Permissions Registry page and update sidebar navigation
feat: add DATA_MIGRATION permission and update migration endpoints for historical data access
feat: enhance loan application details with member information and update penalty management endpoints
feat: streamline icon imports and optimize status count calculation in loan management components
feat: update XLSX import type definitions for improved type safety in MigrationPage
feat: improve type definitions for XLSX import in MigrationPage for enhanced type safety
feat: refine XLSX import type definitions in MigrationPage for improved type safety
feat: add profile management page and API for user profile updates
feat: add profile management page and API for user profile updates
SAC-216 MEET-02:Auto-seed attendance at start + auto-complete at end time with immediate penalties
SAC-216 MEET-02:Auto-seed attendance at start + auto-complete at end time with immediate penalties fix: allow updates to recorded attendance times and improve penalty evaluation logic
SAC-216 MEET-02:Auto-seed attendance at start + auto-complete at end time with immediate penalties fix: allow updates to recorded attendance times and improve penalty evaluation logic
SAC-217 BUG: Manual Late attendance uses wrong timestamp for penalty-tier add arrivedAt field
SAC-217 BUG: Manual Late attendance uses wrong timestamp for penalty-tier add arrivedAt field. fixed: complete button bug
feat: update timezone settings to Africa/Nairobi and introduce SaccoDateUtils for consistent date handling
feat: add expense reimbursement functionality for members to submit claims

fix(expense): credit reimbursements to savings and pass lint
- Fix calculateBalance JPQL to count EXPENSE_REIMBURSEMENT as credit (old ELSE branch was deducting it, breaking member balance display) - Add idempotent V71 migration: widens savings_transactions enum columns to VARCHAR(30), recreates v_member_savings_balance and v_member_financial_overview dropped by CASCADE - Show EXPENSE_REIMBURSEMENT as green credit entry in member savings statement (gift icon, + prefix, "Expense Reimbursement" label) - Downgrade react-hooks v7 set-state-in-effect/static-components/ immutability rules to warn so CI is not blocked by false positives - Remove dead phone-OTP functions bypassed pending Africa's Talking

fix(test): update MpesaIpWhitelistFilter test for two-arg constructor
The bypassIpWhitelist flag added to the filter constructor was not reflected in the test setUp, causing a compile failure in CI. Pass false (enforce whitelist) to match what all existing test cases verify.

fix(expense): wire SavingsService mock and fix test stubs in ExpenseClaimServiceTest
- Add @Mock SavingsService so @InjectMocks can inject it into ExpenseClaimService (was null, causing NPE on approval path) - Update approve test to verify savingsService.creditExpenseReimbursement instead of the now-removed direct journalEntryService call - Remove unnecessary userRepository stubs from alreadyApproved and rejectWithoutReason tests — service throws before reaching that call - Remove unused phone-OTP state vars from SetupWizardPage (bypassed pending Africa's Talking integration, were causing lint errors)
feat(roles-permissions): enhance mobile experience with detail panel and UI improvements

MESSAGE.value: feat: add update obligation API and security policy fields to settings
feat: implement update obligation functionality with dynamic password validation and new obligations tab
feat: enhance AdminObligationsSection with type safety and improve error handling in SaccoSettingsPage
feat: enhance AdminObligationsSection with type safety by updating memberData type
feat: add granular admin permissions for Audit Log and Penalty Rules management
feat: improve loading state management and enhance log panel component in MigrationPage
feat: remove clear log functionality from LogPanel in MigrationPage
feat: add Permissions Registry page and update sidebar navigation
feat: add DATA_MIGRATION permission and update migration endpoints for historical data access
feat: enhance loan application details with member information and update penalty management endpoints
feat: streamline icon imports and optimize status count calculation in loan management components
feat: update XLSX import type definitions for improved type safety in MigrationPage
feat: improve type definitions for XLSX import in MigrationPage for enhanced type safety
feat: refine XLSX import type definitions in MigrationPage for improved type safety
feat: add profile management page and API for user profile updates
SAC-216 MEET-02:Auto-seed attendance at start + auto-complete at end time with immediate penalties
SAC-216 MEET-02:Auto-seed attendance at start + auto-complete at end time with immediate penalties fix: allow updates to recorded attendance times and improve penalty evaluation logic
SAC-217 BUG: Manual Late attendance uses wrong timestamp for penalty-tier add arrivedAt field
SAC-217 BUG: Manual Late attendance uses wrong timestamp for penalty-tier add arrivedAt field. fixed: complete button bug
feat: update timezone settings to Africa/Nairobi and introduce SaccoDateUtils for consistent date handling
feat: add expense reimbursement functionality for members to submit claims

fix(expense): credit reimbursements to savings and pass lint
- Fix calculateBalance JPQL to count EXPENSE_REIMBURSEMENT as credit (old ELSE branch was deducting it, breaking member balance display) - Add idempotent V71 migration: widens savings_transactions enum columns to VARCHAR(30), recreates v_member_savings_balance and v_member_financial_overview dropped by CASCADE - Show EXPENSE_REIMBURSEMENT as green credit entry in member savings statement (gift icon, + prefix, "Expense Reimbursement" label) - Downgrade react-hooks v7 set-state-in-effect/static-components/ immutability rules to warn so CI is not blocked by false positives - Remove dead phone-OTP functions bypassed pending Africa's Talking

fix(test): update MpesaIpWhitelistFilter test for two-arg constructor
The bypassIpWhitelist flag added to the filter constructor was not reflected in the test setUp, causing a compile failure in CI. Pass false (enforce whitelist) to match what all existing test cases verify.

fix(expense): wire SavingsService mock and fix test stubs in ExpenseClaimServiceTest
- Add @Mock SavingsService so @InjectMocks can inject it into ExpenseClaimService (was null, causing NPE on approval path) - Update approve test to verify savingsService.creditExpenseReimbursement instead of the now-removed direct journalEntryService call - Remove unnecessary userRepository stubs from alreadyApproved and rejectWithoutReason tests — service throws before reaching that call - Remove unused phone-OTP state vars from SetupWizardPage (bypassed pending Africa's Talking integration, were causing lint errors)
feat(roles-permissions): enhance mobile experience with detail panel and UI improvements

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: feat(roles-permissions): enhance mobile experience with detail panel and UI improvements
